docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $579.06 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT KINDREGAN JAMES P.DBA. 4336 IRVING ST. APTS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KINDREGAN JAMES P.DBA. 4336 IRVING ST. APTS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KINDREGAN JAMES P.DBA. 4336 IRVING ST. APTS. $579.06 PRINCIPAL, $14.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $593.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT KINDREGAN JAMES P.DBA. 4336 IRVING ST. APTS. HEARING SET FOR APR-19-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF APR-19-1993, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT KINDREGAN JAMES P.DBA. 4336 IRVING ST. APTS.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KINDREGAN JAMES P.DBA. 4336 IRVING ST. APTS.
